| 2022 | SFP Annual | 10.1016/j.contraception.2022.10.001 | 10.1016/j.contraception.2022.09.004 | https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/36403795/ |
| 2021 | SFP Annual | 10.1016/j.contraception.2021.07.006 | 10.1016/j.contraception.2021.07.007 | https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/34289414/ |
| 2020 | SFP Annual | 10.1016/j.contraception.2020.07.008 | 10.1016/j.contraception.2020.07.007 | https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/32707100/ |
| 2019 | SFP Annual | 10.1016/j.contraception.2019.07.008 | 10.1016/j.contraception.2019.07.007 | https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/31348904/ |
| 2018 | NAFP (8th) | 10.1016/j.contraception.2018.07.006 | 10.1016/j.contraception.2018.07.005 | https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/30031792/ |
| 2017 | NAFP (7th) | 10.1016/j.contraception.2017.07.163 | — | https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/28757435/ |
| 2016 | NAFP (6th) | 10.1016/j.contraception.2016.07.189 | — | https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/27477065/ |
| 2015 | NAFP (5th) | 10.1016/j.contraception.2015.06.024 | — | https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/26141818/ |
| 2014 | NAFP (4th) | Not found | — | — |
| 2013 | NAFP (3rd) | Not found | — | — |

**Pipeline implications:** Because individual SFP abstracts lack unique DOIs, the DOI-chain search (`03c_doi_chain_search.R`) and ScienceDirect-level affiliation backfill cannot be applied per abstract. Abstract ingestion would require parsing the full-text HTML of the collection article to extract individual abstracts and authors, then matching each against PubMed and CrossRef by title/author string — the same strategy used for AUGS. The abstract collection articles are freely accessible via PubMed and resolvable via `https://doi.org/10.1016/j.contraception.YYYY.MM.NNN`.

**Comparison across all five societies:**

| Feature | AAGL (JMIG) | SMFM (AJOG) | ASRM (F&S) | AUGS (Urogynecology) | SFP (Contraception) |
|---------|-------------|-------------|------------|----------------------|---------------------|
| Individual abstract DOIs | Yes | Yes | Yes | No | No |
| Elsevier/ScienceDirect | Yes | Yes | Yes | No (LWW) | Yes |
| DOI-chain search applicable | Yes | Yes | Yes | No | No |
| Affiliation backfill applicable | Yes | Yes | Yes | No | Partial |
| Auth required to browse | No | No | Yes | No | No (via PubMed) |
| Avg abstracts/year | ~90 | ~500 | ~1,200 | ~400 | ~300 |
| Abstract collection format | Supplement | Supplement | Supplement | Supplement | Regular article |

*Sources: https://societyfp.org/learning/annual-meeting/; https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/37821000/; https://www.contraceptionjournal.org/article/S0010-7824(18)30259-2/fulltext*

### A11.13 NASPAG/ACRM Abstract URLs (2013–2023)

NASPAG (North American Society for Pediatric and Adolescent Gynecology) Annual Clinical and Research Meeting (ACRM) abstracts are published in the *Journal of Pediatric and Adolescent Gynecology* (JPAG, ISSN 1083-3188, Elsevier/ScienceDirect). Each abstract receives a unique DOI following the pattern `10.1016/j.jpag.YYYY.MM.NNN` — the same individual-DOI model as SMFM and ASRM. Abstracts consistently appear in Issue 2 of each volume, and volume number follows the formula: Volume = Year − 1987. The 2020 ACRM was cancelled due to COVID-19 but accepted abstracts were still published; 2021 and 2022 meetings were virtual. Abstract counts are small (~16–54/year), making NASPAG the lowest-volume society in this comparison.

| Year | Meeting | JPAG Vol | Issue | ScienceDirect URL | Sample DOI |
|------|---------|----------|-------|-------------------|------------|
| 2023 | 37th ACRM, Nashville, TN | 36 | 2 | https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-pediatric-and-adolescent-gynecology/vol/36/issue/2 | 10.1016/j.jpag.2023.01.089 |
| 2022 | 36th ACRM (Virtual) | 35 | 2 | https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-pediatric-and-adolescent-gynecology/vol/35/issue/2 | 10.1016/j.jpag.2022.01.xxx |
| 2021 | 35th ACRM (Virtual) | 34 | 2 | https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-pediatric-and-adolescent-gynecology/vol/34/issue/2 | 10.1016/j.jpag.2021.02.005 |
| 2020 | 34th ACRM (Cancelled — abstracts published) | 33 | 2 | https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-pediatric-and-adolescent-gynecology/vol/33/issue/2 | 10.1016/j.jpag.2020.01.xxx |
| 2019 | 33rd ACRM | 32 | 2 | https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-pediatric-and-adolescent-gynecology/vol/32/issue/2 | 10.1016/j.jpag.2019.02.002 |
| 2018 | 32nd ACRM | 31 | 2 | https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-pediatric-and-adolescent-gynecology/vol/31/issue/2 | 10.1016/j.jpag.2018.02.017 |
| 2017 | 31st ACRM, Chicago, IL | 30 | 2 | https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-pediatric-and-adolescent-gynecology/vol/30/issue/2 | 10.1016/j.jpag.2017.03.013 |
| 2016 | 30th ACRM, Toronto, ON | 29 | 2 | https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-pediatric-and-adolescent-gynecology/vol/29/issue/2 | 10.1016/j.jpag.2016.01.003 |
| 2015 | 29th ACRM, Orlando, FL | 28 | 2 | https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-pediatric-and-adolescent-gynecology/vol/28/issue/2 | 10.1016/j.jpag.2015.02.005 |
| 2014 | 28th ACRM, Philadelphia, PA | 27 | 2 | https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-pediatric-and-adolescent-gynecology/vol/27/issue/2 | 10.1016/j.jpag.2014.01.007 |
| 2013 | 27th ACRM | 26 | 2 | https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-pediatric-and-adolescent-gynecology/vol/26/issue/2 | 10.1016/j.jpag.2013.01.005 |

*Sources: https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-pediatric-and-adolescent-gynecology; https://www.naspag.org/acrm-future-and-past*

---

### A11.14 Metadata Fields Available in Each Society's Published Abstracts

A critical determinant of pipeline performance is the author and affiliation metadata embedded in the published abstract. Richer metadata enables more precise PubMed matching (via full first names), better ORCID disambiguation (via affiliation strings), and more complete author-characteristic enrichment (gender, career stage, subspecialty). The table below summarizes what is consistently available for each society.

| Field | AAGL (JMIG) | SMFM (AJOG) | ASRM (F&S) | AUGS (Urogynecology) | SFP (Contraception) | NASPAG (JPAG) |
|-------|-------------|-------------|------------|----------------------|---------------------|---------------|
| **Abstract title** | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| **Abstract text** | Partial (2012–2018 paywalled) | Yes | Yes (auth required) | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| **First author full first name** | **No — initials only** | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| **All author full names** | Initials only | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| **Author count** | Yes (parseable) | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| **First author affiliation** | Partial (52.7% via backfill) | Yes | Yes (auth required) | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| **All author affiliations** | Partial | Yes | Yes (auth required) | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| **Corresponding author email** | No | Rarely | Rarely | Sometimes | Sometimes | Rarely |
| **Individual abstract DOI** | Yes | Yes | Yes | **No** | **No** | Yes |
| **Platform** | ScienceDirect | ScienceDirect | ScienceDirect | LWW | ScienceDirect | ScienceDirect |
| **Auth required to access** | No | No | **Yes** | No | No | No |
| **Avg abstracts/year** | ~90 | ~500 | ~1,200 | ~400 | ~300 | ~35 |
| **Years available** | 2012–2023 | 2013–2023 | 2013–2023 | 2013–2023 | 2015–2023 | 2013–2023 |

**Key finding — AAGL's initials-only limitation:** AAGL/JMIG is the only society where first author names are published as initials only (e.g., "R.S. Guido" rather than "Robert S. Guido"). This is the single most consequential metadata gap in the current pipeline, directly limiting: (1) ORCID hit rate (15.8% with full initials vs. a projected >60% with full names); (2) gender inference accuracy (genderize.io requires full first names); and (3) NPI matching (exact first-name matching is disabled for 84% of US authors). All five comparison societies publish full author first names, making them substantially easier to enrich. Any multi-society expansion should treat AAGL's initials-only format as a known limitation requiring manual resolution or supplementation from the published full paper's author list.

### A11.15 SASGOG Abstracts (2013–2023) — No Journal Publication

SASGOG (Society for Academic Specialists in General Obstetrics and Gynecology) was founded in 2012 and does **not** publish its meeting abstracts in a peer-reviewed journal. Unlike every other society in this comparison, SASGOG abstracts are posted only on the society website (sasgog.org), are not indexed in PubMed, ScienceDirect, or CrossRef, and receive no DOIs. Abstracts are limited to 300 words and undergo peer review, but formal journal publication is not part of the submission process. SASGOG does offer a "Best Manuscript from a SASGOG Abstract Award" to encourage conversion to full manuscripts, but the abstracts themselves are not citable with DOIs.

**Pipeline implication:** Because SASGOG abstracts lack DOIs, PubMed indexing, and structured metadata, the current pipeline cannot be applied without first scraping the society website directly to extract abstract text and author information. Matching would rely entirely on title/author string search against PubMed — the weakest of the three search strategies. For years 2013–2018, website URLs are unknown or may not exist, creating a data recovery problem analogous to the AAGL 2017 CORS-blocking issue.

| Year | Meeting | URL | DOIs? | PubMed Indexed? |
|------|---------|-----|-------|-----------------|
| 2023 | 11th | https://sasgog.org/2023-abstracts/ | No | No |
| 2022 | 10th | https://sasgog.org/2022-abstracts/ | No | No |
| 2021 | 9th (Virtual) | https://sasgog.org/2021-abstracts/ | No | No |
| 2020 | 8th (Virtual) | https://sasgog.org/2020-abstracts/ | No | No |
| 2019 | 7th | https://sasgog.org/2019-abstracts/ (likely) | No | No |
| 2018 | 6th | https://sasgog.org/2018-abstracts/ (likely) | No | No |
| 2017 | 5th | Unknown | No | No |
| 2016 | 4th | Unknown | No | No |
| 2015 | 3rd | Unknown | No | No |
| 2014 | 2nd | Unknown | No | No |
| 2013 | 1st | May not exist (society founded 2012) | No | No |

*Sources: https://sasgog.org/abstracts/; https://sasgog.org/about/; https://sasgog.org/annual-meeting/*

---

### A11.16 Complete Society Comparison — Abstract Accessibility and Pipeline Feasibility

The table below summarizes all seven societies assessed for pipeline expansion, ranked by pipeline feasibility.

| Society | Journal | Platform | Individual DOIs | PubMed Indexed | Auth Required | Avg Abstracts/Year | Pipeline Feasibility |
|---------|---------|----------|----------------|----------------|---------------|-------------------|---------------------|
| **AAGL** | JMIG | ScienceDirect | Yes | Yes | No | ~90 | ✓ Current |
| **SMFM** | AJOG | ScienceDirect | Yes | Yes | No | ~500 | ✓ High |
| **NASPAG** | JPAG | ScienceDirect | Yes | Yes | No | ~35 | ✓ High |
| **ASRM** | F&S | ScienceDirect | Yes | Yes | Yes (browse) | ~1,200 | ✓ Medium |
| **SFP** | Contraception | ScienceDirect | No (collection-level) | Yes | No | ~300 | △ Medium |
| **AUGS** | Urogynecology | LWW | No (supplement-level) | Yes | No | ~400 | △ Medium |
| **SASGOG** | None | Society website | No | No | No | ~50 | ✗ Low |

**Feasibility criteria:** High = individual DOIs + Elsevier/ScienceDirect + no auth; Medium = collection-level DOIs or non-Elsevier platform requiring new scraper; Low = no journal publication, no DOIs, no PubMed indexing.

### A11.17 SGO Annual Meeting Abstracts (2013–2023)

SGO (Society of Gynecologic Oncology) annual meeting abstracts are published as supplement issues of *Gynecologic Oncology* (ISSN 0090-8258, Elsevier/ScienceDirect). Every abstract receives a unique DOI — guaranteed by CrossRef registration enforcement, Elsevier's PII system (algorithmically unique within the journal namespace), and sequential article numbering (monotonically increasing NNN counter per calendar month). Individual abstract DOIs resolve publicly via `https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ygyno.YYYY.MM.NNN`; full supplement browsing requires institutional ScienceDirect access.

**2013 note:** No dedicated SGO abstract supplement exists for 2013. Volume 129 Suppl S1 is an unrelated genomics supplement. The closest published record is a "Summary of the 44th Annual Meeting on Women's Cancers" (DOI 10.1016/j.ygyno.2013.03.028, Vol 129 Issue 2). Dedicated SGO supplement issues began consistently in 2014.

**2020 note:** The in-person meeting was cancelled due to COVID-19 — SGO's first cancellation in history. All 757 selected abstracts (49 plenary + 59 featured poster + 635 poster + 14 late-breaking) were still published in the October 2020 supplement, and SGO held free webinars to present the science.

| Year | SGO Meeting | Volume | ScienceDirect URL | DOI Pattern | Approx. Abstracts |
|------|------------|--------|-------------------|-------------|-------------------|
| 2023 | 54th Annual | 176, Suppl S1 | sciencedirect.com/…/vol/176/suppl/S1 | 10.1016/j.ygyno.2023.06.NNN | ~600 |
| 2022 | 53rd Annual (Phoenix, AZ, Mar 18–21) | 166, Suppl S1 | sciencedirect.com/…/vol/166/suppl/S1 | 10.1016/S0090-8258(22)XXXXX-X | ~580 |
| 2021 | 52nd Annual | 162, Suppl S1 | sciencedirect.com/…/vol/162/suppl/S1 | 10.1016/S0090-8258(21)XXXXX-X | ~700 |
| 2020 | 51st Annual (cancelled — COVID-19) | 159, Suppl S1 | sciencedirect.com/…/vol/159/suppl/S1 | 10.1016/j.ygyno.2020.06.NNN | 757 |
| 2019 | 50th Annual (Honolulu, HI, Mar 16–19) | 154, Suppl S1 | sciencedirect.com/…/vol/154/suppl/S1 | 10.1016/j.ygyno.2019.04.NNN | ~500 |
| 2018 | 49th Annual (New Orleans, LA, Mar 24–27) | 149, Suppl S1 | sciencedirect.com/…/vol/149/suppl/S1 | 10.1016/j.ygyno.2018.04.NNN | ~450 |
| 2017 | 48th Annual (National Harbor, MD, Mar 12–15) | 145, Suppl S1 | sciencedirect.com/…/vol/145/suppl/S1 | 10.1016/j.ygyno.2017.03.NNN | ~500 |
| 2016 | 47th Annual (San Diego, CA, Mar 19–22) | 141, Suppl S1 | sciencedirect.com/…/vol/141/suppl/S1 | 10.1016/j.ygyno.2016.04.NNN | ~600 |
| 2015 | 46th Annual (Chicago, IL, Mar 28–31) | 137, Suppl S1 | sciencedirect.com/…/vol/137/suppl/S1 | 10.1016/j.ygyno.2015.01.NNN | ~600 |
| 2014 | 45th Annual | 133, Suppl S1 | sciencedirect.com/…/vol/133/suppl/S1 | 10.1016/j.ygyno.2014.03.NNN | ~600 |
| 2013 | 44th Annual (Los Angeles, CA) | 129, Issue 2 (no Suppl S1) | — | 10.1016/j.ygyno.2013.03.028 (meeting summary only) | N/A |

*Sources: SGO Annual Meeting Abstracts; SGO 2023 Supplement (ScienceDirect); 51st Annual Meeting 2020 (PMC); gynecologiconcology-online.net*

---

### A11.18 Updated Complete Society Comparison

| Society | Journal | Platform | Individual DOIs | DOI Pattern | PubMed Indexed | Auth Required | Avg Abstracts/Year | Feasibility |
|---------|---------|----------|----------------|-------------|----------------|---------------|--------------------|-------------|
| **AAGL** | JMIG | ScienceDirect | Yes | 10.1016/j.jmig.Y.M.NNN | Yes | No | ~90 | ✓ Current |
| **SMFM** | AJOG | ScienceDirect | Yes | 10.1016/j.ajog.Y.M.NNN | Yes | No | ~500 | ✓ High |
| **SGO** | Gyn Onc | ScienceDirect | Yes | 10.1016/j.ygyno.Y.M.NNN | Yes | Partial | ~570 | ✓ High |
| **NASPAG** | JPAG | ScienceDirect | Yes | 10.1016/j.jpag.Y.M.NNN | Yes | No | ~35 | ✓ High |
| **ASRM** | F&S | ScienceDirect | Yes | 10.1016/j.fertnstert.Y.M.NNN | Yes | Yes (browse) | ~1,200 | ✓ Medium |
| **SFP** | Contraception | ScienceDirect | No (collection-level) | 10.1016/j.contraception.Y.M.NNN | Yes | No | ~300 | △ Medium |
| **AUGS** | Urogynecology | LWW | No (supplement-level) | 10.1097/SPV.xxx | Yes | No | ~400 | △ Medium |
| **SASGOG** | None | Society website | No | None | No | No | ~50 | ✗ Low |

### A11.19 CREOG & APGO Annual Meeting Abstracts (2013–2023)

CREOG & APGO (Council on Resident Education in Obstetrics and Gynecology & Association of Professors of Gynecology and Obstetrics) annual meeting abstracts have a two-phase publication history:

- **2013–2014:** Published as a single proceedings article in *Teaching and Learning in Medicine* (Taylor & Francis) — one DOI per year, **not** individual DOIs per abstract.
- **2015–present:** Moved to *Obstetrics & Gynecology* (the Green Journal, Wolters Kluwer/LWW) as an October Supplement (Issue 10001). Each abstract receives a unique DOI with the prefix `10.1097/01.AOG.` followed by a unique hash per abstract (e.g., `10.1097/01.AOG.0000585640.43634.ce`). Confirmed by spot-check.

Volume numbers increase by 2 per year (Vol 126 in 2015 → Vol 142 in 2023). Abstracts are also cataloged without DOIs at https://tools.apgo.org/abstract-catalog/ covering 2012–2025.

**Platform note:** The Green Journal is hosted on LWW (journals.lww.com), not ScienceDirect — the same platform as AUGS/Urogynecology. The LWW-specific scraper developed for AUGS would apply here as well.

**Published in Obstetrics & Gynecology — October Supplements (2015–2023):**

| Year | Meeting | O&G Vol | Issue | LWW URL | DOI Pattern |
|------|---------|---------|-------|---------|-------------|
| 2023 | CREOG & APGO | 142 | 10001 | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2023/10001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2022 | CREOG & APGO | 140 | 10001 | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2022/10001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2021 | CREOG & APGO | 138 | 10001 | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2021/10001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2020 | CREOG & APGO (Orlando, FL) | 136 | 10001 | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2020/10001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2019 | CREOG & APGO | 134 | 10001 | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2019/10001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2018 | CREOG & APGO | 132 | 10001 | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2018/10001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2017 | CREOG & APGO | 130 | 10001 | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2017/10001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2016 | CREOG & APGO | 128 | 10001 | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2016/10001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2015 | CREOG & APGO | 126 | 10001 | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2015/10001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |

**Published in Teaching and Learning in Medicine (2013–2014):**

| Year | Meeting | TLM Vol | Issue | DOI |
|------|---------|---------|-------|-----|
| 2014 | CREOG & APGO | 28 | 1 | 10.1080/10401334.2015.1107492 |
| 2013 | CREOG & APGO | 26 | 4 | 10.1080/10401334.2014.945034 |

*Note: 2013–2014 each have one DOI for the entire collection, not individual abstract DOIs. The 2020 meeting was held in-person in February 2020 (pre-COVID); supplement publication timing may have shifted. 2021 URL is inferred from volume pattern.*

*Sources: https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/Pages/collectiondetails.aspx?TopicalCollectionId=129; https://tools.apgo.org/abstract-catalog/; https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/10401334.2015.1107492*

---

### A11.20 Final Complete Society Comparison (All 9 Societies)

| Society | Journal | Platform | Individual DOIs | DOI Pattern | PubMed Indexed | Auth Required | Avg Abstracts/Year | Feasibility |
|---------|---------|----------|----------------|-------------|----------------|---------------|--------------------|-------------|
| **AAGL** | JMIG | ScienceDirect | Yes | 10.1016/j.jmig.Y.M.NNN | Yes | No | ~90 | ✓ Current |
| **SMFM** | AJOG | ScienceDirect | Yes | 10.1016/j.ajog.Y.M.NNN | Yes | No | ~500 | ✓ High |
| **SGO** | Gyn Onc | ScienceDirect | Yes | 10.1016/j.ygyno.Y.M.NNN | Yes | Partial | ~570 | ✓ High |
| **NASPAG** | JPAG | ScienceDirect | Yes | 10.1016/j.jpag.Y.M.NNN | Yes | No | ~35 | ✓ High |
| **ASRM** | F&S | ScienceDirect | Yes | 10.1016/j.fertnstert.Y.M.NNN | Yes | Yes (browse) | ~1,200 | ✓ Medium |
| **CREOG/APGO** | O&G (Green J) | LWW | Yes (2015+) | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx | Yes | No | ~200 | △ Medium |
| **SFP** | Contraception | ScienceDirect | No (collection-level) | 10.1016/j.contraception.Y.M.NNN | Yes | No | ~300 | △ Medium |
| **AUGS** | Urogynecology | LWW | No (supplement-level) | 10.1097/SPV.xxx | Yes | No | ~400 | △ Medium |
| **SASGOG** | None | Society website | No | None | No | No | ~50 | ✗ Low |

### A11.21 ACOG Annual Clinical & Scientific Meeting Abstracts (2013–2023)

ACOG (American College of Obstetricians and Gynecologists) annual meeting abstracts are published in *Obstetrics & Gynecology* (the Green Journal, ISSN 0029-7844, Wolters Kluwer/LWW) as a May Supplement each year. Each abstract has a unique DOI using the Wolters Kluwer format `10.1097/01.AOG.` followed by a unique hash (e.g., `10.1097/AOG.0b013e3181636fe9`). The URL pattern uses `/05001` consistently across all years.

**Volume formula:** Vol = 97 + (2 × (Year − 2000)); so Vol 121 in 2013, Vol 141 in 2023.

**Platform:** LWW (journals.lww.com) — same as AUGS and CREOG/APGO. The LWW-specific scraper developed for those societies applies here.

**2020 caveat:** The ACOG 2020 Annual Meeting (Nashville, April 24–27) was cancelled due to COVID-19. The May 2020 supplement may contain only previously accepted abstracts or may be absent — verify at the URL before ingesting.

**2021:** Meeting was virtual; abstracts were still published in the supplement.

| Year | O&G Vol | Issue | LWW URL | DOI Prefix |
|------|---------|-------|---------|------------|
| 2023 | 141 | 5S | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2023/05001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2022 | 139 | 5S | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2022/05001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2021 | 137 | 5S | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2021/05001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2020 | 135 | 5S | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2020/05001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2019 | 133 | 5S | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2019/05001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2018 | 131 | 5S | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2018/05001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2017 | 129 | 5S | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2017/05001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2016 | 127 | 5S | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2016/05001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2015 | 125 | 5S | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2015/05001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2014 | 123 | Suppl 1 | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2014/05001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |
| 2013 | 121 | 5S | https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2013/05001 | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx |

*Sources: https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/toc/2023/05001; https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/25756102/ (Vol 123, Suppl 1, pp 1S–198S); https://journals.lww.com/greenjournal/Pages/collectiondetails.aspx?TopicalCollectionId=128*

---

### A11.22 Final Complete Society Comparison (All 10 Societies)

| Society | Journal | Platform | Individual DOIs | DOI Pattern | PubMed Indexed | Auth Required | Avg Abstracts/Year | Feasibility |
|---------|---------|----------|----------------|-------------|----------------|---------------|--------------------|-------------|
| **AAGL** | JMIG | ScienceDirect | Yes | 10.1016/j.jmig.Y.M.NNN | Yes | No | ~90 | ✓ Current |
| **SMFM** | AJOG | ScienceDirect | Yes | 10.1016/j.ajog.Y.M.NNN | Yes | No | ~500 | ✓ High |
| **SGO** | Gyn Onc | ScienceDirect | Yes | 10.1016/j.ygyno.Y.M.NNN | Yes | Partial | ~570 | ✓ High |
| **NASPAG** | JPAG | ScienceDirect | Yes | 10.1016/j.jpag.Y.M.NNN | Yes | No | ~35 | ✓ High |
| **ASRM** | F&S | ScienceDirect | Yes | 10.1016/j.fertnstert.Y.M.NNN | Yes | Yes (browse) | ~1,200 | ✓ Medium |
| **ACOG** | O&G (Green J) | LWW | Yes | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx | Yes | No | ~800 | △ Medium |
| **CREOG/APGO** | O&G (Green J) | LWW | Yes (2015+) | 10.1097/01.AOG.xxx | Yes | No | ~200 | △ Medium |
| **SFP** | Contraception | ScienceDirect | No (collection-level) | 10.1016/j.contraception.Y.M.NNN | Yes | No | ~300 | △ Medium |
| **AUGS** | Urogynecology | LWW | No (supplement-level) | 10.1097/SPV.xxx | Yes | No | ~400 | △ Medium |
| **SASGOG** | None | Society website | No | None | No | No | ~50 | ✗ Low |

**LWW societies (ACOG, CREOG/APGO, AUGS)** share a platform — a single LWW scraper covers all three. **ScienceDirect societies (AAGL, SMFM, SGO, NASPAG, ASRM, SFP)** share the existing Elsevier infrastructure. SASGOG remains the only society with no viable programmatic ingestion path.
